resources.string: Track your saved words, today\'s review load, and the topics that need the most attention.
A quick visual split between urgent reviews, active learning, scheduled cards, and stable vocabulary.
Topics with the highest review pressure appear first. Tap a topic to open its full library detail.
No topics yet. Save words from Scan Text or Translate to start building progress data.
Save words from Scan Text or Translate to start tracking your learning progress.
You have %1$d words due today. Review them first to stay ahead of the forgetting curve.
You are actively building %1$d words. A short session today will make them stick better.
Your library looks stable right now. Keep adding fresh vocabulary to maintain momentum.
Your queue is under control. %1$d words are already scheduled for the next sessions.
Review distribution: %1$d due, %2$d building, %3$d scheduled, %4$d stable.
